description_long: This object is a classic shotgun featuring a long, black barrel and a wooden stock with a rich, reddish-brown grain. The stock is full-sized, extending from the rear to the action, and has a smooth, slightly curved profile for shoulder support. The barrel is slender and unadorned, with no visible ribbing or venting, and appears to be a single-barrel configuration. The action area is compact and black, with a visible trigger and a rounded trigger guard. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible embellishments or tactical attachments. The materials and finish suggest a traditional, durable firearm suitable for hunting or sport shooting.
description: A traditional shotgun with a long black barrel and a full wooden stock, featuring a simple, classic design and a rounded trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, black barrel, and the trigger guard.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the circular muzzle of the barrel and the narrow profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other side of the wooden stock and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the wooden stock and the slim profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
